originalTitle: Reinforcement Learning dev with Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Numerical Instability and Determinism in Puffer 4 CUDA Backend
summary: Debugged numerical instability and nondeterminism in the Puffer 4 raw CUDA training backend. Focused on FP32 vs BF16 precision, porting environments like 2048 and Neural MMO, and achieving stable training runs.
